title: Senior Teacher - Manya Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Manya Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manya Group family as a Senior Teacher in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manya Group:
Manya Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group!
